channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Thane Man's Dizzy Spell: Police Dismiss 'Zombie Drug' Rumors, Blame Pregabalin Overdose
item.description: Maharashtra police have clarified that a viral video showing a man in a disoriented state in Thane was not due to a 'zombie drug,' but rather an overdose of Pregabalin, a medication prescribed for ner...

item.title: Former North Carolina Governor Roy Cooper holds strong fundraising lead over Michael Whatley in 2026 Senate race
item.description: New fundraising disclosures show that former North Carolina Governor Roy Cooper has built a substantial financial advantage over his Republican opponent Michael Whatley in the race for the state's ope...

item.title: Josh Papali'i sidelined for up to eight weeks as Raiders reshuffle squad
item.description: Canberra Raiders veteran Josh Papali'i is expected to miss six to eight weeks after scans confirmed a partial calf tear, dealing a significant blow to the club following their win over the Melbourne S...

item.title: Former CBSA Employee Fired for Unauthorized Database Access and Conflict of Interest
item.description: Placide Kalisa, a former senior program officer with the Canada Border Services Agency (CBSA), was officially dismissed after a federal labour tribunal upheld his firing in 2017. Over a period of at l...

item.title: Rawalpindi Faces Disruption as US-Iran Talks Security Measures Intensify
item.description: Rawalpindi is currently experiencing a significant level of disruption as preparations for the second round of US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad are underway. The government has implemented strict secu...

item.title: Rising Energy Costs Expected to Push Canada’s Inflation Higher, Say Economists
item.description: Canada is facing a notable increase in inflation, largely driven by rising energy prices. Economists warn that the country’s inflation rate, already at 2.4 per cent, may climb further as fuel costs co...

item.title: Canadian advocates call for stronger measures to remove sexual deepfakes online
item.description: The Canadian federal government is considering criminalizing the distribution of sexualized deepfakes through Bill C-16, which aims to update laws on non-consensual sharing of intimate images. Advocat...

item.title: BJP Leaders Use Strong Rhetoric During Bengal Election Campaign
item.description: During the recent election campaign in West Bengal, several senior BJP leaders employed highly charged language to address supporters and opponents. Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma used the p...

item.title: Police Commissioner Masemola Faces Charges in Pretoria Court Over Tender Scandal
item.description: National Police Commissioner General Fannie Masemola is set to appear in the Pretoria Magistrates Court after being summoned by the Investigative Directorate Against Corruption (IDAC) last month. Mase...

item.title: Pakistan Stock Exchange Sees Strong Recovery Amid Saudi Fund Inflow
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) witnessed a significant recovery on Tuesday, with its benchmark KSE-100 index climbing by 2,161.14 points, or 1.26 per cent, reaching 174,357.84 points by late mornin...

item.title: US Seizes Iranian Vessel Suspected of Carrying Dual-Use Goods

item.title: Fitch downgrades the Philippines' credit outlook: Implications for the economy
item.description: Fitch Ratings downgraded its outlook for the Philippines from stable to negative on April 20, 2026. While the country's credit rating of 'BBB' remains intact, the outlook downgrade raises concerns abo...

item.title: PlayStation Introduces Age Verification for Messaging and Voice Chat Features
item.description: Sony has announced that later this year, PlayStation users will need to verify their age to continue using communication features such as messages and voice chat. This global initiative aims to provid...

item.title: Distinguished Second World War veteran Frank Chester dies aged 109
item.description: Frank Chester, a highly decorated Second World War veteran, has passed away at the age of 109 in a nursing home in Malvern, Worcestershire. Born in Ludlow, Shropshire, in April 1917, Chester served in...

item.title: Fortescue pushes for diesel tax credit reforms amid rising fuel costs
item.description: Fortescue Metals Group, under the leadership of billionaire Andrew Forrest, has announced a national TV and radio campaign targeting the current diesel tax credit system in Australia. The company, whi...

item.title: Millicent Omanga’s Weight Loss Journey Draws Mixed Reactions from Kenyans
item.description: Kenyan politician Millicent Omanga has stirred online conversations after photos showing her significant weight loss went viral. The images, shared around April 19, clearly contrast her past and curre...

item.title: Amazon to invest in Anthropic to boost AI capacity with $25 billion deal
item.description: On April 20, 2026, Amazon announced its plan to invest up to $25 billion in Anthropic, an AI startup known for developing the Claude model. This investment is part of a larger deal where Anthropic wil...
